summary.lv: Accenture, vadošs globāls konsultāciju, tehnoloģiju un operāciju uzņēmums ar 790,000 darbiniekiem pasaulē, meklē SAP Analytics konsultantu Rīgas birojam.
summary.en: Accenture — a leading global consulting, technology and operations company with 790,000 employees worldwide — is hiring a SAP Analytics Consultant for its Riga office.
